calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Neil Rones for Administrator.
Albert Grisgby in Propria Persona.
Cedric Grigsby appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

Both Albert and Cedric expressed concern stating that their Mother always treated all of her Children equally and loved them equally, that documents were signed six months before their Mother's passing, that their Mother would have never wanted everything to go to the Sister, that it was always supposed to be split equally, that their Mother had dementia, that they feel Iona had been taking advantage of their Mother, that they found out that Iona had received money from the IRS, spoke of how Iona went from having nothing to purchasing a home in Las Vegas for over $300,000.00, that Iona lied to them saying that the Mother had no will and left everything to her, that the Mother's investments were her sole investments, that Iona changed everything over to her name, that their Mother's tombstone is still blank, that they have not signed any papers, spoke of the time periods of their incarcerations, spoke of the Louisiana property, stated that they have a document showing that there was $500,000.00, etc. Mr. Rones stated that the Louisiana property was handled in an ancillary proceeding in Louisiana, that the Louisiana property will be titled in all three names, that there is no evidence that the pay on death accounts were done incorrectly and that the objections have not provided any evidence to support their claims. Mr. Rones also stated that k-1's were issued and were provided to all of the Beneficiaries, that the pay on death accounts were not part of the estate, that the pay on death accounts were changed prior to the Decedent passing, that there is no evidence that she didn't want to do this and that there were two brokerage accounts in two different banks. The Amended First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Neil Rones for and with Iona Wilson.
Wendy Gibson appeared by telephone for and with Mattie Hollins (present in Court).
Albert Grigsby in Propria Persona.

Mr. Rones stated that both Sons were incarcerated at the time of death, that his Client wanted to wait until they got out, that there was $26,000.00 in debts and that there was $11,000.00 in the bank. Mr. Rones also stated that Ms. Wilson went to the Bank with a small estate declaration and without Counsel, that she put in the difference to pay the debts, and that she kept the house and the cars insured. Ms. Gibson stated that her Client objects, that things weren't disclosed and that six months prior to the Decedent's death a life insurance was taken out with Iona as the beneficiary. Mr. Gibson also stated that they don't believe Iona acted in good faith, that there are assets that have not been disclosed and that there is a clear conflict with the Brothers. Mr. Rones stated that there was a house, a car, and three rings that were left to his Client. Mr. Grigsby stated that his Mother had a safe deposit box, that he wants follow his Mother's will and that he does not want Iona to be administrator. All three Petitions for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary are taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Continued To Nov-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Iona Wilson (Petitioner) in Propria Persona.
Albert Grigsby (Son of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Grigsby stated that someone else was also named in the will to serve and that he is contesting Ms. Wilson's request to be appointed. The Court informed the parties that the matter needs to be continued for Mr. Grigsby to file written objections. The Court also encouraged Ms. Wilson to hire an Attorney. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to November 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Grigsby needs to file and serve written opposition no later than November 1, 2017.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.
